welcome_subtitle: We all carry rules about food—some helpful, some not. This is a safe space to notice one rule and gently reflect on it.
rule_options: I shouldn't eat after a certain time
I need to control portions strictly

reflections.Is this rule too strict?: Does this feel flexible, or does it create pressure to follow it perfectly?
reflections.Is this actually helping me?: Does this rule support your well-being, or add stress or guilt?
reflections.What happens when I can't follow it?: What do you notice when this rule doesn't go as planned?

complete_message: Awareness is the first step toward freedom. You've taken a brave step in identifying and reflecting on a food rule. Carry this gentle understanding with you today.
